items.speaker: Queequeg
items.text: Ship almost fixed up. Thank you. Only half to go.

items.speaker: Queequeg
items.text: As long ship is repaired, will be fine. All will be fine.

items.speaker: Queequeg
items.text: By the way, that big "fish." Serene Bay.

items.speaker: Queequeg
items.text: We failed before. You be careful.
